title: Orcas were just filmed destroying a sunfish for no reason at all
text:
Scientists just filmed a pod of orcas destroying a sunfish for no reason at all.

Ocean sunfish can weigh over 2,000 pounds, drift near the surface, and have almost no natural predators. Off the coast of New Zealand, the orcas were caught on camera ramming one so hard it shattered into thousands of pieces, then swimming away without eating a single bite.

Researchers think it might be play. Or hunting practice. Or something we don't have a word for yet.
highlights: destroying a sunfish for no reason at all
Off the coast of New Zealand
something we don't have a word for yet
